articles.title: Ariedo Braida talks about the difference between his Milan and the current one
articles.summary: Milan is experiencing a great period of uncertainty: it is not yet known who the points of reference will be in the Rossoneri's next season. There are no names yet for the replacements of Allegri, Furlani, Tare and Moncada.
